abilities.name: Verdurous Harmony
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 7+, you can return 1 slain model to the target unit. If you picked a **Tree‑Revenants** unit, you can return D3 slain models instead of 1.

abilities.name: Envoys of the Everqueen
abilities.effect: While this unit is contesting an objective, friendly units contesting that objective have **WARD (6+)**.

abilities.name: All-Out Slaughter
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. You cannot pick this unit.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Turned to Crystal
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 1" of this unit to be the target and roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 2+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Martial Memories
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects to apply to this unit this phase:

***Memories of War:*** Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this unit.

***Memories of Peace:*** Add 1 to save rolls for this unit.

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Massive Impaling Talons** is 1.

abilities.name: Groundshaker
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 4+, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** this phase.

enhancements.name: Walkers of the Hidden Paths
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is within 3" of any terrain features and not in combat.
enhancements.effect: Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again more than 6" from all enemy units. That unit cannot use **MOVE** abilities for the rest of the phase.

enhancements.name: Vengeful Spirits of the Land
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit that is contesting an objective and roll a dice.
enhancements.effect: On a 4+, inflict D3 mortal damage on that enemy unit.

enhancements.name: Leaves on the Wind
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is in combat to be the target.
enhancements.effect: The target can immediately use the ‘Retreat’ ability as if it were your movement phase and no mortal damage is inflicted on it if it does so.

enhancements.name: Lifebringers
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn

enhancements.name: Regrowth
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 18" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

enhancements.name: Seed of Rebirth
enhancements.effect: If your general would be destroyed, before removing them from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, your general is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on them have no effect. Then, **Heal (1)** your general. This unit cannot use this ability again for the rest of the battle.

enhancements.name: Gnarled Warrior
enhancements.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for your general.

enhancements.name: Treesong
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
enhancements.effect: On a 7+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target unit’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

enhancements.name: Head of the Hunt
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s melee weapons while the enemy **quarry** is within 9" of and visible to them.

enhancements.name: Zephyrkin
enhancements.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **FIGHT** ability for your general
enhancements.effect: If your general charged this turn, they can move up to 2D6" after that **FIGHT** ability has been resolved. They cannot end that move in combat.

enhancements.name: Bold Spirit
enhancements.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Hero Phase
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to wound rolls for friendly units’ combat attacks while they are within your general’s combat range.

enhancements.name: Cunning Pursuer
enhancements.effect: While your general is in combat, add 1 to charge rolls for friendly units wholly within 12" of them. Add 2 instead while your general is in combat with the **quarry**.

battleTraits.name: Ley Lines
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
battleTraits.effect: **Heal (1)** each friendly unit that is within 3" of any terrain features.

battleTraits.name: Strike and Fade
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that used a **FIGHT** ability this turn and is within 3" of any terrain features, then roll a dice.
battleTraits.effect: On a 2+, remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again so that each model in the unit is within 3" of any terrain features and more than 6" from all enemy units.

battleTraits.name: Target of Vengeance
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.declare: If there is no enemy **quarry** on the battlefield, pick an enemy unit on the battlefield to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target is the **quarry** for the rest of the battle.

battleTraits.name: Airborne Cohesion
battleTraits.effect: Friendly units have a coherency range of 2".

battleTraits.name: Song of the Hunt
battleTraits.effect:
You gain 1 **chord** each time an enemy **quarry** is destroyed. The following cumulative effects apply depending on the number of **chords** you have:

1 chord - **Simple**: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly units while they are within 9" of the enemy **quarry**.
2 chords - **Tuneful**: Add 1 to hit rolls for friendly units’ attacks while they are within 9" of the enemy **quarry**.
3+ chords - **Melodic**: Add 1 to wound rolls for friendly units’ attacks while they are within 9" of the enemy **quarry**.
